description: This file defines a React component called AppShell that structures the main layout of a web application, including navigation, sidebar, and main content areas. It also includes a helper NavLink component for navigation links.

methods.name: NavLink
methods.description: A functional component that renders a styled link using Next.js Link component, displaying a label.

methods.name: AppShell
methods.description: Main functional component that arranges page header, sidebar, and content area based on props.
